steps.title: Find the contextual signal
steps.content: The text says ephemeral objects are "useful as ______ cultural change, revealing shifts in norms, values, and concerns." The blank describes how the objects function — they reveal or indicate change.

steps.title: Pick the precise word
steps.content:
"Indices of" means "indicators of" — these objects serve as indicators that point to cultural change. "Alternatives to" misses the indicator function, "conjectures about" means guesses (the objects aren't guesses), and "pretexts for" means false excuses.

That matches choice C — C is correct.
